eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Shasta, CA; at 10:01 PM on JUN 18, 2026 Effective until 2:01 AM JUN 19, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS A TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM FOR SHASTA COUNTY. IN THE EVENT OF AN ACTUAL EMERGENCY, TUNE TO THIS STATION FOR IMPORTANT INFORMATION.
